query:
-- Distribuição de matchScore por faixas
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN CAST(matchScore AS DECIMAL(5,4)) >= 0.95 THEN '0.95-1.00'
    WHEN CAST(matchScore AS DECIMAL(5,4)) >= 0.90 THEN '0.90-0.95'
    WHEN CAST(matchScore AS DECIMAL(5,4)) >= 0.85 THEN '0.85-0.90'
    WHEN CAST(matchScore AS DECIMAL(5,4)) >= 0.80 THEN '0.80-0.85'
    WHEN CAST(matchScore AS DECIMAL(5,4)) >= 0.75 THEN '0.75-0.80'
    ELSE '< 0.75'
  END as faixa,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spread_analysis WHERE dataReferencia = (SELECT MAX(dataReferencia) FROM spread_analysis)), 1) as pct
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = (SELECT MAX(dataReferencia) FROM spread_analysis)
GROUP BY faixa
ORDER BY faixa DESC;
